source_intake_record.raw_question_text: There’s one angle of incidence onto a prism for which the light inside an isosceles prism travels parallel to the base and emerges at an angle. A laboratory measurement finds that \beta = 52.2^\circ for a prism shaped like an equilateral triangle. What is the prism’s index of refraction?

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: There’s one angle of incidence onto a prism for which the light inside an isosceles prism travels parallel to the base and emerges at an angle. A laboratory measurement finds that \beta = 52.2^\circ for a prism shaped like an equilateral triangle. What is the prism’s index of refraction?
